title: uv run executor
description: Run a command with uv run in the selected project directory.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to the workspace root.

python.description: Python version or interpreter passed through as --python.

with.description: Additional dependencies passed through as repeated --with values.

command.description: Command to execute with uv run.

args.description: Arguments for the command executed by uv run.

extraArgs.description: Additional arguments appended before command execution.
